name: Fried Rice (Chow Fun)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until lightly browned but not crunchy. Remove and set aside.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the bacon drippings and scramble. Once cooked, remove from heat and chop very fine.
3. Add the cooked rice to the pan with the chopped eggs and stir-fry for approximately 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (meat, green onion, bean sprouts, mushrooms) and mix well. Continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes until thoroughly heated through.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve piping hot.
